title: Alerts
description: A single notification raised when a new article matches an active subscription's saved search.

subscriptionId.description: the subscription whose saved search matched

articleId.description: the matching article (kept when the article is deleted -> set null)

title.description: the alert headline shown in the Alerts list

summary.description: a one-line summary of why the match fired

read.description: whether the user has dismissed/read this alert

subscription.description: the subscription that raised this alert
